12 X 12, 24 Hours & Daily Reflections
Women's Beginners / Step or Topic Meeting
A special welcome to newcomers and those returning to the program.
Meeting topics:
Week 1: Step of the Month, and Daily Reflection
Week 2: Living Sober, Daily Reflection
Week 3: Daily Reflection, and Body, Mind, Spirit reading
Week 4: Open Discussion
Week 5: Each Day a New Beginning, Daily Reflection
Step of the Month:
Step 1: January, April, July, October
Step 2: February, May, August, November
Step 3: March, June, September, December

name: This is It Women's Step Study Group
notes: [Online Meetings ID: 697154508] This Is It Women's Group is a Beginner's Step Study: the 1st week we talk about the 1st step, the 2nd week the 2nd step, the 3rd week the 3rd step, the 4th week we do a wrap-up. If there happens to be a 5th week, we have a Speaker’s Choice topic. The meeting starts at 7 pm CST but we open at 6:30 pm CST for fellowship. We also stay open 30 minutes after the meeting for fellowship as well.
group: This is It Women's Step Study Group

name: This is It Women's Step Study Group
notes: [Online Meetings ID: 697154508] This Is It Women's Group is a Beginner's Step Study: the 1st week we talk about the 1st step, the 2nd week the 2nd step, the 3rd week the 3rd step, the 4th week we do a wrap-up. If there happens to be a 5th week, we have a Speaker’s Choice topic. The meeting starts at 7 pm CST but we open at 6:30 pm CST for fellowship. We also stay open 30 minutes after the meeting for fellowship as well.
